info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD5DTPolioContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

ValueSet-IMMZD5DTPolioContraindicationsV.title: IMMZD5DTPolioContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD5DTPolioContraindicationsV.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD5DTPolioContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: The client has history of severe allergic reactions-59
Poliovirus vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement required-66
Poliovirus vaccination with bOPV is contraindicated-281

ValueSet-IMMZD5DTPolioContraindicationsV.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD5DTPolioContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD5DTPolioContraindicationsVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
